title: alpinia ruiziana
intro: Alpinia ruiziana is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, commonly known as the red ginger or galangal. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The health benefits of Alpinia ruiziana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Alpinia ruiziana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional remedies to address various health issues.
